title: Hantavirus cluster - MV Hondius
locationLabel: MV Hondius off Cape Verde / Praia area
locationLabelEn: MV Hondius off Cape Verde / Praia area
notes: WHO reported eight cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster, including three deaths. Five of the eight cases were confirmed as hantavirus.
notesEn: WHO reported eight cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster, including three deaths. Five of the eight cases were confirmed as hantavirus.

title: Suspected hantavirus cases - MV Hondius
notes: Part of the total eight reported cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster were not yet confirmed at the time of WHO's update.
notesEn: Part of the total eight reported cases linked to the MV Hondius cluster were not yet confirmed at the time of WHO's update.

title: ECDC preliminary assessment
locationLabel: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
locationLabelEn: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
notes: ECDC published a preliminary assessment and recommendations for the cruise-ship-associated hantavirus cluster.
notesEn: ECDC published a preliminary assessment and recommendations for the cruise-ship-associated hantavirus cluster.

title: WHO disease outbreak notice
notes: WHO reported that a cluster of severe respiratory illness aboard a cruise ship had been notified on 2 May 2026.
notesEn: WHO reported that a cluster of severe respiratory illness aboard a cruise ship had been notified on 2 May 2026.

title: Ship isolation near Praia
notes: Passengers and crew were reported to be in isolation after Cape Verde authorities barred the ship from docking.
notesEn: Passengers and crew were reported to be in isolation after Cape Verde authorities barred the ship from docking.

title: Medevac aircraft stop - Gran Canaria
notes: A plane carrying evacuees from the MV Hondius landed in Gran Canaria after Morocco refused a landing request, according to regional government sources cited by AFP.
notesEn: A plane carrying evacuees from the MV Hondius landed in Gran Canaria after Morocco refused a landing request, according to regional government sources cited by AFP.

title: Reported medevac stopover refusal - Morocco
notes: Media reports said Morocco refused a stopover or landing request for an air ambulance linked to the MV Hondius evacuation. Exact official reason was not immediately clear.
notesEn: Media reports said Morocco refused a stopover or landing request for an air ambulance linked to the MV Hondius evacuation. Exact official reason was not immediately clear.

title: MV Hondius expected in Tenerife
notes: The ship was reported to be heading toward Tenerife, with repatriation and quarantine measures being arranged for passengers.
notesEn: The ship was reported to be heading toward Tenerife, with repatriation and quarantine measures being arranged for passengers.

title: Medical evacuation to the Netherlands
notes: Patients with suspected hantavirus from the MV Hondius were reported to be evacuated to the Netherlands aboard medical aircraft.
notesEn: Patients with suspected hantavirus from the MV Hondius were reported to be evacuated to the Netherlands aboard medical aircraft.

title: Passengers disembarked at Saint Helena
notes: Around 40 passengers were reported to have disembarked at Saint Helena before the outbreak was reported, leading to international tracing efforts.
notesEn: Around 40 passengers were reported to have disembarked at Saint Helena before the outbreak was reported, leading to international tracing efforts.

title: Flight contact tracing - Johannesburg route
notes: Two Singapore residents were on the same flight from Saint Helena to Johannesburg as a confirmed hantavirus case who later died in South Africa.
notesEn: Two Singapore residents were on the same flight from Saint Helena to Johannesburg as a confirmed hantavirus case who later died in South Africa.

title: Singapore residents isolated and tested
locationLabel: National Centre for Infectious Diseases, Singapore
locationLabelEn: National Centre for Infectious Diseases, Singapore
notes: Singapore isolated and tested two residents after exposure linked to the MV Hondius outbreak. One had mild symptoms and the other was asymptomatic.
notesEn: Singapore isolated and tested two residents after exposure linked to the MV Hondius outbreak. One had mild symptoms and the other was asymptomatic.

title: Texas passengers contacted by health officials
titleEn: Texas passengers contacted by health officials
notes: The U.S. CDC notified Texas health officials that two Texas residents had been passengers on the MV Hondius. They were contacted and reported no symptoms.
notesEn: The U.S. CDC notified Texas health officials that two Texas residents had been passengers on the MV Hondius. They were contacted and reported no symptoms.

title: U.S. federal monitoring statement
locationLabel: United States CDC / State Department response
locationLabelEn: United States CDC / State Department response
notes: The U.S. government said it was monitoring the MV Hondius situation with confirmed hantavirus and coordinating around U.S. passengers.
notesEn: The U.S. government said it was monitoring the MV Hondius situation with confirmed hantavirus and coordinating around U.S. passengers.

title: UK passengers advised to isolate
notes: UK authorities were reported to ask British passengers linked to the MV Hondius to isolate after returning to the UK.
notesEn: UK authorities were reported to ask British passengers linked to the MV Hondius to isolate after returning to the UK.

title: MV Hondius departed from Ushuaia
notes: The MV Hondius departed from Ushuaia, Argentina, on April 1 before the outbreak was identified.
notesEn: The MV Hondius departed from Ushuaia, Argentina, on April 1 before the outbreak was identified.

title: Possible exposure linked to Argentina birdwatching trip
titleEn: Possible exposure linked to Argentina birdwatching trip
notes: The outbreak was reported as potentially linked to a birdwatching trip in South America before the cruise.
notesEn: The outbreak was reported as potentially linked to a birdwatching trip in South America before the cruise.

title: Confirmed case treated in South Africa
titleEn: Confirmed case treated in South Africa
notes: A British patient evacuated from the MV Hondius was treated in Johannesburg and reported to be improving. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO total.
notesEn: A British patient evacuated from the MV Hondius was treated in Johannesburg and reported to be improving. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO total.

title: British crew member hospitalized in the Netherlands
titleEn: British crew member hospitalized in the Netherlands
notes: A British expedition guide was hospitalized in the Netherlands after evacuation from the MV Hondius. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO total.
notesEn: A British expedition guide was hospitalized in the Netherlands after evacuation from the MV Hondius. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO total.

title: Passengers from at least 12 countries traced
titleEn: Passengers from at least 12 countries traced
notes: Reuters reported that people from at least 12 countries disembarked at Saint Helena before the outbreak was recognized, including seven British citizens and six from the United States.
notesEn: Reuters reported that people from at least 12 countries disembarked at Saint Helena before the outbreak was recognized, including seven British citizens and six from the United States.

title: U.S. repatriation plane planned for passengers
titleEn: U.S. repatriation plane planned for passengers
notes: Spanish authorities coordinated evacuations, with the United States reported to be sending a plane for U.S. nationals.
notesEn: Spanish authorities coordinated evacuations, with the United States reported to be sending a plane for U.S. nationals.

title: UK repatriation flight planned
notes: The United Kingdom was reported to be chartering a plane for British nationals and crew linked to the MV Hondius.
notesEn: The United Kingdom was reported to be chartering a plane for British nationals and crew linked to the MV Hondius.

title: UK third suspected hantavirus case
notes: A suspected hantavirus case involving a British national was reported on Tristan da Cunha.
notesEn: A suspected hantavirus case involving a British national was reported on Tristan da Cunha.

title: Spain prepared isolated reception area
notes: Spanish emergency services prepared an isolated area to receive passengers and crew from the MV Hondius in Tenerife.
notesEn: Spanish emergency services prepared an isolated area to receive passengers and crew from the MV Hondius in Tenerife.

title: Andes virus strain identified
notes: Sequencing by South African authorities identified an Andes hantavirus strain, the hantavirus strain known for possible limited human-to-human transmission.
notesEn: Sequencing by South African authorities identified an Andes hantavirus strain, the hantavirus strain known for possible limited human-to-human transmission.

title: Dutch passenger died on board
notes: A Dutch passenger reportedly died on board the MV Hondius on April 11. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.
notesEn: A Dutch passenger reportedly died on board the MV Hondius on April 11. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.

title: Body and 29 passengers disembarked at Saint Helena
titleEn: Body and 29 passengers disembarked at Saint Helena
notes: Between April 22 and 24, the body of the Dutch passenger was reportedly disembarked at Saint Helena along with 29 passengers.
notesEn: Between April 22 and 24, the body of the Dutch passenger was reportedly disembarked at Saint Helena along with 29 passengers.

title: Wife of Dutch passenger evacuated and died in Johannesburg
titleEn: Wife of Dutch passenger evacuated and died in Johannesburg
notes: The wife of the Dutch passenger was reportedly evacuated from Saint Helena and later died in Johannesburg. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.
notesEn: The wife of the Dutch passenger was reportedly evacuated from Saint Helena and later died in Johannesburg. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.

title: British passenger evacuated from Ascension Island
titleEn: British passenger evacuated from Ascension Island
notes: A sick British passenger reportedly disembarked on Ascension Island and was evacuated by medical aircraft to Johannesburg. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.
notesEn: A sick British passenger reportedly disembarked on Ascension Island and was evacuated by medical aircraft to Johannesburg. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.

title: German passenger died on board
notes: A German passenger reportedly died on board the MV Hondius on May 2. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.
notesEn: A German passenger reportedly died on board the MV Hondius on May 2. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.

title: Passenger hospitalized in Zurich
notes: A passenger who had disembarked at Saint Helena was reportedly hospitalized in Zurich on May 4. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.
notesEn: A passenger who had disembarked at Saint Helena was reportedly hospitalized in Zurich on May 4. Count kept at zero to avoid double counting against the WHO aggregate total.

title: Crew members and contact evacuated to Netherlands and Germany
titleEn: Crew members and contact evacuated to Netherlands and Germany
locationLabel: Cape Verde evacuation to Netherlands and Germany
locationLabelEn: Cape Verde evacuation to Netherlands and Germany
notes: Two crew members and one contact case were reportedly evacuated from Cape Verde to the Netherlands and Germany.
notesEn: Two crew members and one contact case were reportedly evacuated from Cape Verde to the Netherlands and Germany.

title: MV Hondius expected to arrive in the Canary Islands
titleEn: MV Hondius expected to arrive in the Canary Islands
notes: The MV Hondius was expected to arrive in the Canary Islands on May 10.
notesEn: The MV Hondius was expected to arrive in the Canary Islands on May 10.
